name: ambassadorc-v5
description: Lifesaver Refer & Earn - Ambassador Program v5

scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.smoke:foxpro-operations: cd backend && npm run smoke:foxpro-operations && cd ../frontend && npm run smoke:admin-pages
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: cd backend && npx prisma db seed
